headline: Stock Market Today, April 6: Kosmos Energy Rises to 52-Week High as Shares Outpace Analyst Targets
summary: Kosmos Energy hit a 52-week high as shares pushed past analyst targets, even as skepticism lingers over whether offshore production and oil prices can back up the rally.

headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Challenges
